business_ideas.idea: Menopause-focused health apps and treatments (Bonafide, GenEva model)
Premium assisted living facilities with Centenarian fitness focus
Strava-like app for continuous glucose monitor data and community
Personalized metabolic health platform using CGM as loss leader
Longevity coaching apps integrating blood work, fitness and metabolic data
Glucose tracking community and social features around Dexcom Stelo

predictions.text: Nursing will be fastest growing occupation 2020-2030 with 275k new jobs
CGM adoption will unlock major market for wellness apps and community platforms
Within five years guessing on fitness and diet without data will be considered foolish
